nasb.text: and not a new convert, so that he will not become conceited and fall into the condemnation incurred by the devil.

esv.text: He must not be a recent convert, or he may become puffed up with conceit and fall into the condemnation of the devil.

cnv.text: 初信主的不可作監督，恐怕他驕傲，就落在魔鬼所受的刑罰裡。

ccb.text: 初信主的人不可做监督，免得他自高自大，遭受魔鬼所受的惩罚。

csbs.text: 做监督的不可以是新信徒，免得他自以为是，就落在魔鬼所受的惩罚里；
